prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约8013→10727→9828→10643→16024名，2025年位次大幅后移约5381名（增幅50.6%），主要受专业组结构调整及考古学等冷门专 业拉低影响，2025年基准约16024名；该校在黑龙江省物理类招生计划2021–2023年均为11人，2024年增至15人，2025年增至16人；2026年计划进一步扩招 至24人，较2025年增加8人（增幅50%），连续三年扩招，位次数字趋于增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜约第125名，近年排名稳 定在124–131名区间，属于中游偏上211院校；近年声誉评价未见明显舆情事件；抖音综合热度排名第105位，评价为“一般”，短视频平台曝光量处于211院校中下 游水平，报考关注度平稳；第五轮学科评估中，应用经济学获评A-，对应物理类招生的会计学、法学等专业；电气工程及其自动化、电子信息类等工科专业虽无 A类学科评级，但属社会热门方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度高热推荐；计算机类推荐；法学分化观望；化学类（生化环材） 明显劝退。本省2026年普通高考总人数约16.7万人，物理类考生约11.44万人（估算），较2025年11.74万人略减约2.6%，竞争环境略有缓和。；辽宁大学位于邻省沈阳，对黑龙江考生具有天然地域亲和力；该校在黑龙江招生占比约2.3%–2.9%（2024–2025年），属中等外省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次16024名、2026年物理类扩招50%（位次数字大幅增大）、本省物理类考生略减约2.6%（位次数字略减小）及2025年已出现的大幅后移趋势，预测2026年物理类 最低位次约20781名，区间20281–21281名。连续扩招及2025年位次跳升是位次后移的最关键因素。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 8013 → 10727 → 9828 → 10643 → 16024. In 2025, the ranking significantly dropped by about 5381 positions (an increase of 50.6%), mainly due to adjustments in major group structure and the influence of less popular majors such as archaeology, lowering the baseline to about 16024 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for physics category in Heilongjiang Province was 11 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 15 in 2024, and further to 16 in 2025. The 2026 plan further expands to 24 students, an increase of 8 students (50%) compared to 2025, with three consecutive years of expansion, leading to a trend of increasing ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 125th in the 2026 main list of the Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 124–131 range in recent years, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 institutions. No significant public opinion incidents have been observed in recent reputation evaluations. It ranks 105th in comprehensive Douyin popularity, rated as 'average', with short video platform exposure at a mid-to-lower level among 211 universities, indicating stable application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics received an A- rating, corresponding to majors such as Accounting and Law in the physics category. Engineering majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Electronic Information, although not rated as A-class disciplines, are popular social directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended with high social heat; Computer majors are recommended; Law is divided with a wait-and-see attitude; Chemistry majors (Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials) are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in the province is about 167,000, with physics category candidates estimated at about 114,400, a slight decrease of about 2.6% from 117,400 in 2025, indicating a slightly eased competitive environment. Liaoning University is located in neighboring Shenyang, offering natural regional affinity for Heilongjiang candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang is about 2.3%–2.9% (2024–2025), representing a moderate out-of-province enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 16024, a 50% expansion in physics category in 2026 (significantly increasing ranking numbers), a slight decrease of about 2.6% in provincial physics category candidates (slightly decreasing ranking numbers), and the significant downward trend already observed in 2025, the predicted minimum ranking for physics category in 2026 is approximately 20781, with a range of 20281–21281. Continuous expansion and the ranking jump in 2025 are the most critical factors for the ranking decline.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking of 20781 is in the middle of the range 20281–21281. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Cyberspace Security, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Accounting) as the main direction, with Tier 1 Electronic Information/Electrical majors as a reach, and Tier 3 basic sciences and less popular majors as a safety net. When the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of 20281, it is advisable to prioritize reaching for popular engineering majors such as Communication Engineering and Electrical Engineering.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2134 → 1611 → 1702 → 2327 → 1933, showing a fluctuating trend over the past five years. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform (first year of History Category), the ranking shifted back to 2327, and in 2025 it rebounded to 1933. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 1933. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Heilongjiang Province was 18 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 17 students in 2024–2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 27 students, an increase of 10 students (approximately 58.8%) compared to 2025, substantially increasing enrollment slots, easing competition pressure, and leading to a larger ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 125th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 124–131 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. No significant public opinion incidents have been observed in recent reputation evaluations. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 105th, rated as 'average', with short video platform exposure at the middle-to-lower level among 211 universities, indicating stable application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, corresponding to enrollment majors such as Economics, Finance, and International Economics and Trade, which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Accounting, and other popular liberal arts majors are socially hot; Finance/Economics majors show a divided wait-and-see trend; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in the province is approximately 167,000, slightly decreasing from the combined 172,100 History and Physics Category takers in 2025, with History Category takers estimated at about 52,600, indicating a slight easing of competition. Liaoning University is located in Shenyang, a neighboring province, which has natural regional affinity for Heilongjiang candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang is about 2.3%–2.9% (2024–2025), a medium scale for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1933, the significant expansion of History Category enrollment in 2026 by approximately 58.8% (ranking number increases), a slight decrease of about 3.8% in the number of History Category takers in the province (ranking number slightly decreases), and stable university reputation, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 2585, with a range of 2085–3085. Expansion is the most critical factor for the ranking shift backward.
